content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed Part A (build_checkpoint_tree filtering of tracked-but-gitignored and assume-unchanged paths in src/adapters/worktree.rs:124-309) and Part B (removal of `result` symlink from index in commit 70eabf73). Implementation correctly preserves the real-index version for tracked+gitignored paths so checkpoint commits no longer flip `result`-style symlinks; comprehensive test coverage in tests/unit/checkpoint_test.rs spans tracked+ignored, post-`rm --cached`, assume-unchanged (incl. tab in path), .git/info/exclude, core.excludesFile, and non-UTF-8 paths. Byte-level NUL-separated parsing is correct, the `update-index -z --index-info` pipe is closed properly via `wait_with_output`, and `git ls-files -i -c --exclude-standard` on the current tree returns empty. No critical bugs, correctness gaps, or maintainability risks identified.

## Amendments

None.
